title: Horsing Around
description: Track your hunger while riding a mount and teleport tamed animals with ease!
body:
Horsing Around is a mod that allows you to see your hunger when mounted and teleport your tamed animals to your side after linking them by feeding them a Golden Apple (Customizable by editing the "horsingaround:linking" item tag).
For questions feel free to join my Discord. [![Discord Link](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/611982123435556884/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/maPeNBK "Discord Link")  **Want to support us?** ------------------------ [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/CEpJohV.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Mrbysco "Patreon Link")  -Mrbysco [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/CEpJohV.png)](https://www.patreon.com/shynieke "Patreon")  -ShyNieke [Need a server?](https://www.akliz.net/stekkie "Use code 'stekkie' for 20% off your first month") ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [![](https://i.imgur.com/Etl1Cya.png)](https://www.akliz.net/stekkie "Use code 'stekkie' for 20% off your first month")
